title: 1965 and 1973 Islamabad FJ restorations
summary: Two FJs are being restored to original specs in Islamabad with an old body guy. Use as an original-spec benchmark for tub/chassis finish, chrome/cadmium hardware and bodywork sequencing.
next_action: Ask group for body-guy name, location, photos and whether contact can quote J40 work.

title: Carnation Civic engine bay and wiring cleanup
summary: Akbar praised the Carnation work as a benchmark for wiring cleanup and engine bay finishing. Existing media is already curated under other-build references.
next_action: Use the reference media as a quality bar for loom cleanup, component finish and before/after documentation.

title: Nadir mechanical/body advice path
summary: Nadir is repeatedly recommended for under-hood review, J40 advice and possibly body/interior sourcing.
next_action: Get direct number and define whether he is an adviser, workshop, or sourcing lead.

title: 2005-2011 Vitz/Yaris EPS donor stack
summary: New J40 parts group captured the active request for a complete Vitz steering column, EPS ECU/controller and uncut pigtails/connectors. Later note says 2005-2011 SCP90/NCP90 is needed and 2018 is too hard.
next_action: Keep EPS scout locked to complete donor stack with photos of ECU labels, pigtails, torque sensor and column mounts before payment.

title: Vitz early-2000s manual A/C donor package
summary: J40 parts group request lists the manual A/C cabin-side donor package: heater/evaporator box, evaporator, heater core, blower/fan cage, TXV, drain hose, resistor, ducts and intact plugs.
next_action: Use as the HVAC donor checklist; require donor photos and dimensions before committing to hidden evaporator packaging.

title: 9 inch screen and dash/audio layout
summary: FJ Audio group says a 9 inch Android screen can be installed if back support is handled. The dash plan centralizes the screen/AC and moves key selectors into the right dash cluster.
next_action: Capture final screen model, bezel size, mounting depth, heat/glare risk and back-bracket design before cutting the fascia.

title: Schneider selector switch control map
summary: FJ Audio group captured the 7-selector plan: wipers, lights, spot lamps, aux, blower speed, A/C clutch, diesel fuel stop plus separate hazard button and OEM turn stalk.
next_action: Keep this as the switch allocation baseline until physical dash clearance and wiring loads are verified.

title: Longman chassis rubber and replacement pipe quote path
summary: Longman is already a candidate supplier in the dashboard for pipe_hose and rubber order sheets. State is quote/spec stage, not confirmed supply.
next_action: Send quote-ready lines only after measurement gates are closed; hold hydraulic items unless Longman confirms certified brake/clutch hose capability.

title: Full body-prep materials sequence
summary: Messages captured the full intended path: wax/grease remover, self-etch primer, epoxy primer, seam sealer, bed lining, sound dampening, foam and carpet. Later chat lists Happilac epoxy, U-Pol Acid #8, Autohub HB Body 999 and Carrera rust remover.
next_action: Keep material use gated by cleaned metal condition, product compatibility and recoat windows.

title: Nazim tyre and wheel refresh path
summary: Nazim at Cavalry Grounds can remove tyres, inspect wheels/tyres, refresh rims, balance and return in about two days.
next_action: Ask Akbar for number, then photograph each wheel before send-out and tag valve/tyre condition.

title: Brandreth Road fabrication material scout
summary: Brandreth Road was flagged as a hub for industrial goods, steel, work benches and used workshop equipment. Useful for sheet metal, aluminium, bench/drill/vice support and fabrication consumables.
next_action: Scout with a measured shopping list for 3 mm aluminium, 1.2/1.6 mm sheet steel, 3 mm plate and insulating sheet.

title: OE-near interior upholstery route
summary: Usman Roof Poshish 3M was recommended for total interiors, carpets and roofs. Nadir may also have upholstery sources and can help source side seats.
next_action: Use after body/paint/wiring dirty work is complete; ask for material samples and OE-style stitch/edge references.

title: Coolsun A/C diagnosis and hidden HVAC route
summary: Fj40 group advised Coolsun for a quick A/C diagnosis. This ties to the hidden evaporator and Vitz manual A/C donor idea.
next_action: Use after HVAC packaging photos and donor target are ready; ask Coolsun for serviceability, hose routing and drier/switch recommendations.

title: Local new suspension supplier path
summary: Messages show a preference for a new local supplier route over uncertain OME. Ironman foam cell pricing/lead-time was discussed before ordering.
next_action: Keep local supplier evidence, warranty, exact part numbers and missing front damper follow-up tied to the suspension workstream.

title: Bodyshop alternatives if current pace fails
summary: Group discussion asked for good bodyshop people because the current body guy was not moving at the desired pace.
next_action: Keep as contingency only; do not switch bodyshop without open-work manifest, photos and return gates.

title: Montgomery Road local electrical/body supplies
summary: Local purchase list pointed to Montgomery Road for automotive wire, split loom, star washers, EPS, primer and carpets/mats. Autohub outlet also sits in this lane.
next_action: Use for urgent local buys only after exact spec and quantity are locked.
